---
title: "Sites - Rede C2"
subtitle: "Permanent plots for understanding Caatinga and Cerrado dynamics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - figures/
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Helper: find a file by walking up parent directories (robust to where Quarto renders from)
find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}
```
```{=html}
<style>
  /* FUNDO FIXO */
  body{
    background-image: url("figures/c2_bg.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
  }

  main.content{
    background: transparent;
    padding-top: 2.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  /* Retângulo flutuante só para título/subtítulo */
/* === TITLE (paper strip, left aligned, sem blur) === */
.quarto-title-block{
  display: block !important;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title{
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1.05rem 0;
  margin: 0.4rem 0 1.2rem 0;
  background: rgba(250, 246, 238, 0.94);
  border-top: 4px solid #5C7A3E;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(200,90,58,0.22);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  border-radius: 0;
  backdrop-filter: none !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
}
.quarto-title-block .title,
.quarto-title-block .subtitle{
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  padding: 0 1.2rem;
  text-align: left !important;
}
.quarto-title-block .title{
  color: #C85A3A;
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0;
}
.quarto-title-block .subtitle{
  color: #4A3A22;
  opacity: 0.95;
  font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0;
}

  /* CARTÕES full-bleed e opacos */
.content-card{
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 2rem 2.25rem;
  background: rgba(250, 246, 238, 0.96);
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  border-top: 3px solid #C85A3A;
}
.content-card .inner{
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.content-card h2{
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  color: #C85A3A;
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.8vw, 1.9rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #DDD0B3;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
}
.content-card p{
  font-family: 'Lora', serif;
  line-height: 1.85;
  color: #4A3A22;
}
  .content-card h2{ margin-top: 0; }

  /* JANELA entre cartões (deixa o background aparecer) */
  .bg-window{
    width: 100%;
    height: 5.5rem;
  }

  /* Logos flutuantes */
  .floating-logos {
    position: fixed;
    top: 60px;
    right: 40px;
    width: 165px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    z-index: 50;
  }
  .floating-logos img {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    border-radius: 6px;
  }

  /* --------------------------
     CARROSSEL (faixa em card)
     - começa já preenchendo a largura
     - loop contínuo (conteúdo duplicado)
  --------------------------- */
  .sel-viewport{
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  .carousel-track{
    display: flex;
    gap: 24px;
    width: max-content;
    will-change: transform;
    animation: carousel-marquee 55s linear infinite;
  }

  .carousel-viewport:hover .carousel-track{
    animation-play-state: paused;
  }

  .carousel-img{
    width: clamp(260px, 28vw, 460px);
    height: 220px;
    object-fit: cover;

    border-radius: 10px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);

    transition: transform 0.35s ease, box-shadow 0.35s ease;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .carousel-img:hover{
    transform: scale(1.06);
    box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  }

  @keyframes carousel-marquee{
    0%   { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .carousel-track{ animation: none; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 992px){
    .content-card{ padding: 1.4rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 14px; }
    .bg-window{ height: 3.5rem; }
    .floating-logos{ right: 14px; width: 120px; }
    .quarto-title-block .quarto-title{
      padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
      border-radius: 14px;
    }
    .carousel-img{
      width: clamp(220px, 70vw, 420px);
      height: 200px;
    }
  }
  /* === Leaflet: estética RedeC2 === */
.leaflet-container{
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;              /* evita controles/popup “vazarem” */
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
}

.leaflet-control, .leaflet-bar, .leaflet-control-layers{
  border-radius: 12px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(221,208,179,0.85) !important;
  background: rgba(250,246,238,0.96) !important;
}

.leaflet-bar a{
  border-radius: 10px !important;
}

.leaflet-popup-content-wrapper{
  border-radius: 14px !important;
  background: rgba(250,246,238,0.98) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(221,208,179,0.85) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) !important;
}
.leaflet-popup-tip{
  background: rgba(250,246,238,0.98) !important;
}

/* Popup “card” */
.popup-card{ max-width: 320px; }
.popup-title{
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #2A1F10;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0;
}
.popup-sub{
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7A5A18;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.popup-table{
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}
.popup-table td{
  padding: 0.22rem 0;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.popup-k{ color: #7A5A18; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding-right: 0.6rem; }
.popup-v{ color: #4A3A22; }

.pill{
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.22rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border: 1px solid rgba(221,208,179,0.9);
}
.pill-caatinga{ background: rgba(200,90,58,0.10); color: #C85A3A; border-color: rgba(200,90,58,0.28); }
.pill-cerrado{  background: rgba(92,122,62,0.10); color: #4A7030; border-color: rgba(92,122,62,0.28); }

.map-legend .legend-title{
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7A5A18;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.map-legend .legend-row{
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #4A3A22;
}
.map-legend .dot{
  width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
  display: inline-block;
}
.map-legend .dot-caatinga{ background: #C85A3A; }
.map-legend .dot-cerrado{ background: #5C7A3E; }
</style>

<div class="floating-logos">
  <img src="/figures/c2.png" alt="logo RedeC2">
</div>
````
::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}
::: column-screen
```{=html}
<div class="carousel-fullbleed">
  <div class="carousel">
    <div class="carousel-track">
      <!-- SEQ 1 -->
      <img src="/figures/canudos_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Canudos" />
      <img src="/figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Gruta" />
      <img src="/figures/s_francisco_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="São Francisco" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina 2" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 2" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_1.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 3" />

      <!-- SEQ 2 (cópia) -->
      <img src="/figures/canudos_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Canudos (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Gruta (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/s_francisco_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="São Francisco (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina 2 (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 2 (2)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_1.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 3 (2)" />

      <!-- SEQ 3 (cópia extra) -->
      <img src="/figures/canudos_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Canudos (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/gruta_brejoes_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Gruta (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/s_francisco_dc.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="São Francisco (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/itirapina_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Itirapina 2 (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 2 (3)" />
      <img src="/figures/agua_limpa_1.jpg" class="carousel-img" alt="Água Limpa 3 (3)" />
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
:::
:::
<div class="bg-window"></div>

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}

## Mapa interativo

Explore os sítios permanentes da Rede C2 no mapa abaixo.

```{r}
library(leaflet)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)

# Robust path: search upwards for _input_data/plotMetadata_R2C.csv
csv_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "plotMetadata_R2C.csv"))

if (is.na(csv_path)) {
  stop(
    "Não encontrei o arquivo '_input_data/plotMetadata_R2C.csv'.\n",
    "Diretório de trabalho (getwd): ", getwd(), "\n",
    "Dica: verifique se a pasta '_input_data' está no projeto e contém 'plotMetadata_R2C.csv'."
  )
}

plotMetadata_R2C <- read.csv(csv_path)

# Add term for vegetation
plotMetadata_R2C$biome <- vector("character", nrow(plotMetadata_R2C))
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$kyle_veg_broad == "Forest"]  <- "Caatinga"
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$kyle_veg_broad == "Savanna"] <- "Cerrado"

# Correções manuais
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id == "CIP-21"] <- "Cerrado"
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id == "CIP-22"] <- "Cerrado"
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id == "CIP-23"] <- "Cerrado"
plotMetadata_R2C$biome[plotMetadata_R2C$plot_id == "PNP-04"] <- "Cerrado"

# Corrigir sinal das coordenadas, se necessário
plotMetadata_R2C$longitude[plotMetadata_R2C$longitude > 0] <-
  -plotMetadata_R2C$longitude[plotMetadata_R2C$longitude > 0]
plotMetadata_R2C$latitude[plotMetadata_R2C$latitude > 0]   <-
  -plotMetadata_R2C$latitude[plotMetadata_R2C$latitude > 0]

# Ícones customizados por bioma
custom_icons <- icons(
  iconUrl = ifelse(
    plotMetadata_R2C$biome == "Caatinga",
    "https://leafletjs.com/examples/custom-icons/leaf-red.png",
    "https://leafletjs.com/examples/custom-icons/leaf-orange.png"
  ),
  iconWidth   = 25,
  iconHeight  = 41,
  iconAnchorX = 12,
  iconAnchorY = 41
)

map <- leaflet(
  data    = plotMetadata_R2C,
  width   = "100%",
  height  = 700,
  options = leafletOptions(minZoom = 2, maxZoom = 22)
) %>%
  addControl(
    html = paste0(
      "<div style='text-align:center; line-height:1.2; padding:4px 8px;",
      "background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-radius:8px;",
      "box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);'>",
      "<div style='font-size:14px; font-weight:400;'>", htmlEscape("Sites - Caatinga & Cerrado"), "</div>",
      "</div>"
    ),
    position  = "topleft",
    className = "custom-title"
  ) %>%
  addControl(
    html = paste0(
      "<a href='https://redec2.github.io/redeC2-website/' target='_blank' rel='noopener'>",
      "<img src='/figures/logoc2.png' style='width:150px; height:auto;'>",
      "</a>"
    ),
    position  = "topleft",
    className = "project-logo"
  ) %>%
  htmlwidgets::onRender(
    "function(el, x){
       this.whenReady(function(){
         if (typeof addFilterControl === 'function') {
           addFilterControl.call(this, el, x);
         }
       });
     }"
  ) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap,       group = "OSM Street") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldStreetMap, group = "ESRI Street") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery,   group = "Satellite")  %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenTopoMap,         group = "OpenTopo")   %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.DarkMatter,  group = "Dark Matter") %>%
  addMarkers(
    ~longitude, ~latitude,
    icon  = custom_icons,
    group = "Plots",
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<strong>Name:</strong> ", plot_id,
      "<br><strong>Biome:</strong> ", biome,
      "<br><strong>Area (ha):</strong> ", plot_area,
      "<br><strong>Census Number:</strong> ", n_census,
      "<br><strong>BIO12:</strong> ", bio12,
      "<br><strong>PI:</strong> ", prinv
    )
  ) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    ~longitude, ~latitude,
    radius = 5,
    group  = "Plots",
    label  = ~paste0(plot_id, " (", biome, ")"),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(direction = "auto", textsize = "12px", opacity = 0.9)
  ) %>%
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups    = c("OSM Street", "ESRI Street", "Satellite", "OpenTopo", "Dark Matter"),
    overlayGroups = c("Plots"),
    position      = "bottomleft",
    options       = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE, autoZIndex = TRUE)
  )

map
```

:::
:::
:::
